description: Gold-standard expectations — Spirit/flesh chapter with divine golden chain
mustContain: because of Him who subjected it
For whom He foreknew, He also predestined
Whom He predestined, those He also called
He who didn’t spare His own Son
delivered Him up for us all
mustNotContain: But if any man doesn’t have the Spirit of Christ, He is not His
because of him who subjected it
For whom he foreknew, he also predestined
he who didn’t spare his own Son
